name: Berry Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each slice of white bread into thirds.
2. In a nonstick saucepan, bring the sugar and water to a boil.
3. Add the blueberries and simmer for 2 minutes until they pop; add raspberries and simmer for a minute or until wilted.
4. Strain the mixture over a bowl. Reserve the fruit and return the strained juices to a skillet.
5. Over high heat, reduce the juices until only 1 cup remains and cool until room temperature.
6. Blend the syrup with the fruits.
7. Oil a 6-cup soufflé mold. Line the sides with bread strips and spoon the fruit and syrup mixture into the middle.
8. Trim the bread on the sides so they are level with the fruits. Cover the fruit with more bread.
9. Cover with a plate and place weight on the plate; refrigerate overnight.
10. Unmold (if possible) and serve with whipped cream.
Yield: 6 servings
